selected_submission.label: public-chase
selected_submission.required_wording: Selected Kaggle submission / leaderboard artifact; not claimed as the reportable modeling method.

reportable_lineage.label: reportable
reportable_lineage.method: 35% LightGBM / 35% XGBoost / 30% CatBoost with CatBoost tail2737

ready_to_paste.one_sentence_result: Team 5 crossed Baseline 3 on the live public leaderboard with public MAE 0.7991; for method reporting, we keep the clean 35/35/30 LGB/XGB/CatBoost lineage at public MAE 0.8124 separate from the public-chase selected artifact.
ready_to_paste.methods_paragraph: Our reportable model lineage is an exact recovered ensemble of 35% LightGBM, 35% XGBoost, and 30% CatBoost with CatBoost tail2737. The recovered artifact has SHA-12 bee6f618828d, passes the official submission sanity checks, and has public MAE 0.8124. This is the model lineage we use for methodological discussion because it is reproducible, non-leaky, and rule-safe.
ready_to_paste.leaderboard_paragraph: For Kaggle leaderboard/final-selection purposes, the best already-submitted artifact is submissions/baseline3_public_chase_v0_cat35_08124_alphap0p35.csv, with public MAE 0.7991 and SHA-12 d550c9cbc465. This artifact is labeled public-chase: it is valid as a submitted leaderboard artifact, but it should not be described as the primary reportable modeling improvement.
ready_to_paste.limitations_paragraph: The 0.7991 artifact was chosen after public-feedback-guided alpha probing between recovered historical submissions. Therefore, it carries public-overfit risk and should be separated from the reportable model claim. GRU stack/raw candidates were rejected for final selection after live public MAE 0.9850/0.9916, despite promising local validation.
ready_to_paste.final_selection_paragraph: If final selection is based on submitted Kaggle artifacts, select the 0.7991 public-chase submission. In the written report, describe the clean 0.8124 LGB/XGB/CatBoost anchor as the reportable method lineage and explicitly label the 0.7991 artifact as a public-chase final-selection artifact.

must_not_claim: Do not claim the 0.7991 public-chase artifact is a new training method.
Do not claim the 0.7991 artifact is private-robust without private evidence.
Do not use restored_20260522_* or restored_unverified_* as legal/reportable sources.
Do not select GRU stack/raw as final anchors after their public MAE 0.9850/0.9916 readout.
quota_policy: No more public-chase or GRU submissions today.
